fullText: the difference between running a business pre-AI and postAI is absolutely insane I've started multiple businesses throughout my career Most of them failed A couple of them did pretty well My last one I sold and now I'm a full-time content creator and focused on growing this business And I'm partnering with Microsoft because I want to show you how Microsoft 365 Copilot business has transformed the way that I work Faster tedious work better quality easier scaling everything has changed And I want to highlight those differences for you because I think it'll be helpful My previous business was a software business Obviously not apples to apples comparison with making content for a living but there are a lot of similarities The first thing is writing and documentation It's just one of those things you have to do when growing a business And it's tedious Whether it's strategy documents process documents replying to emails And I was probably spending 10 hours a week on that alone prior to using Copilot And now it's about 2 hours per week That is an 80% time savings One of my go-to prompts is draft an outline about a video topic and then I give it the video topic Include a hook three main talking points and supporting examples And Copilot just runs with it The ideation the research and my writing is better and takes much less time Next is reviewing legal documents This is something I hated doing and I spent a tremendous amount of time and I sent it to our legal council very early and very often meaning it cost a lot of money But now from employment agreements to NDAs customer contracts all of that the first pass goes to co-pilot It saves me a ton of time It saves me a ton of money And whereas I was spending about 5 hours per week now I'm spending less than one So I can just drop the document into C-Pilot and give it a prompt like review this contract highlight anything that is non-standard and flag any unusual terms and it comes back with everything I need to see That is a 90% time savings for me I used to need a full engineering team to build anything Now everybody on my team is empowered to build My team even if they're not engineers just tells Co-Pilot what they need to build So for example build an automation that scores incoming partnership emails and add the top ones to a spreadsheet And it writes the entire thing What used to take a team now just takes a prompt And it's a lot more fun now I get to spend time on the things that I really enjoy doing coming up with cool videos to make for you There's no better time to start a business Use Microsoft 365 co-pilot business Check out the ROI of AI guide that they're providing if you're ready to take your business to the next level with AI link in the description
